data.name: 媽媽活巨乳肉便器
data.detailed_description:
透過「媽媽活」網站認識的對象，竟然是朋友的媽媽，而且她還是個老師！原本嚴肅嚴厲卻深受尊敬的老師，在你的小弟弟面前墮落變成癡女！徹底釋放雌性本能，對你極盡討好與奉獻，變得下賤順從，滿腦子只想著被你幹到懷孕！
享受把友母變成懷孕肉便器的日常！私下、在學校裡，隨時召來這位爆乳媽媽，用小弟弟幹到她崩潰！瞞著學生、兒子和丈夫，在電話中、她睡覺時等各種偷情和背德場景下，把她泡在變態交尾中，讓她拋棄老師、妻子、母親的身份，淪為單純的肉便器！
讓她懷上你的孩子，變成大肚肉便器媽媽！ ！原本嚴厲嚴肅的媽媽老師，被小弟弟徹底馴服，明白地位差距後墮落成肉便器！
盡情享受她與平時反差巨大的抖M雌性聲音、討好聲和失神淫叫吧！

特色

  • 忠實再現日本原創視覺小說
  • 女角完全配音，並有原版日語對話
  • 原版高清CG，採用 16:9 和 4:3
  • 數小時的故事內容
  • 音頻，包括音樂和特效
  • 增強了動畫角色sprite
  • CG 畫廊和場景選擇
  • 享受十幾個 H 場景！

媽媽活巨乳肉便器是一部漢化視的覺小說，由多產的日本開發商 Miel 創作。 Cherry Kiss 旨在為日本以外的遊戲玩家提供真實的日本視覺小說體驗。

**請注意**本遊戲中所描述和視覺呈現的所有角色均超過 18 歲，且本遊戲的製作中未使用任何實際或可識別的未成年人。

data.short_description: 透過「媽媽活」網站認識的對象，竟然是朋友的媽媽，而且她還是個老師！ ？把嚴肅嚴厲的她，用我年輕又精力旺盛的小弟弟乾到崩潰，變成專用的肉便器！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Swipe Right for Sugar Mama Sensei
data.detailed_description:
Ah, the age old adage 'Hot for Teacher' is back again... and who is to blame our poor hormonal protagonist? If YOU had a professor like Chizuru-sensei, lecturing you in her stern yet alluring voice, packed into that just-too-small suit skirt combo with the absolutely lethal stockings underneath, be able to focus on higher education? 

It started out as just another day at college, our protagonist is scrolling through the one legit 'local horny MILFs want to fuck' website and comes across a familiar sexy body. It's either Chizuru's twin sister or all those stories her son has been spewing about his Dad and Chizuru not sleeping together might be legit! 

We at Cherry Kiss understand that this could be seen as a 'Fantasy' of sorts, but please use the user tags responsibly as you read through the debaucherous account of Chizuru's slow slide from strict sensei to cock-addicted sugar mommy!

FEATURES

• Faithful recreation of the original Japanese Visual Novel

• Chizuru is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue AND with new English voice over by the legendary Stephanie Michelle!

• Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

• Click though and read hours of story content

• Audio including music and special effects

• Enhanced with animated character sprites

• A CG Gallery and Scene selections

• Mommy needs boing-boing badly! Read and enjoy over a dozen H-Scenes in this one!

• This title also supports any and all Lovense sex toy devices, wow!

Swipe Right for Sugar Mama Sensei is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: What if those 'horny MILFs in your area just want to FUCK' ads were legit? This is what happens! Watch as Chizuru goes from your strict, ball-busting sensei to a slovenly cock-craving sugar mama obsessed with the protagonist's big dick!
data.supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
